Transcrição Completa: Day 14 - Digital Playbook Strategy

 

Conversa

 

[00:00]"the digital playbook. So, same thing. Go to Fiverr, go to Upwork, give the graphic designer this specific asset, tell them to change it up, mock it up for your company. You get the idea."

 

[00:15]"We're going to go through this one by one. Page number one, and why you want to send this before I even talk about this stuff is because you need to send out something that visualizes your services, your products, your flow, your systems, all those different assets that are also going to be in here."

 

[00:30] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Digital Playbook - Cover Page"

 

NÚMEROS: $5 por cópia no FedEx Kinko, $50-$100 para 10-20 cópias

 

VISUAL: Capa profissional com branding forte, cores consistentes da marca, apresentação spiralbound com capa plástica, material de alta qualidade para eventos presenciais

 

[00:35]"This is great for when you go to events. Dude, print off 10 of these things. Go to kinko.com. Spiralbound these things up. Put the plastic cover on them that FedEx Kinko will do for you at like five bucks a pop for the entire thing."

 

[00:50]"Dude, spend the 50 bucks or the 100 bucks to get a couple of these and go to an event. It makes you look like a baller when you come in with this epic highbranded material that you're going to hand out in a nice spiralbound presentation."

 

[01:05]"You're going to slap down on somebody. Your branding needs to be the colors of all this. You see how powerful the branding is in here? You can go read the 22 immutable laws of branding."

 

[01:18]"We're not going to go too specific on that because it's day number 14 and you don't have time for that right now because you're in the middle of your 30-day sales challenge. You're going to hit your 100 today."

 

[01:28]"But in real time, simple cover, branded pretty easy."

 

[01:32] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Baseball Card - Personal Stats Page"

 

NÚMEROS: Estatísticas de resultados e conquistas pessoais

 

VISUAL: Foto sorridente do proprietário (não estoica), handles de redes sociais listados, estatísticas de performance e resultados, layout estilo "baseball card" com informações profissionais

 

[01:35]"The next slide I call my baseball card. Most people I found will never actually go in and look at these statistics, which kind of disappoints me because I do have a lot of results and these things are awesome."

 

[01:48]"And at the time, this was really early on in my business. So, it was pretty cool. Adds a lot of social handles. I really just found it's better if you put a smiley face up here as well, like you know, you being a little smiley instead of like me looking all stoic and that all that fun stuff."

 

[02:05]"Anyway, baseball card comes."

 

[02:07] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Battle Plan Blueprint"

 

NÚMEROS: 6 passos específicos do processo

 

VISUAL: Seis etapas claramente definidas do processo de trabalho, website listado na parte inferior, informações de contato de email, informações de ponto de contato de vendas, layout organizado passo-a-passo

 

[02:08]"This is what I call the battle plan blueprint. This is six specific steps that we follow through."

 

[02:15]"So, if anybody in real time, if you're at an event or if you send this thing via email with whatever follow-up you want to use, because this is follow-up material, ladies and gentlemen, this gives you an opportunity on day 14 to go back to all those other people that you have already communicated with and be like,"

 

[02:33]"'Hey, uh, just in case we didn't get to have that appointment yet, or hey, just in case you still haven't hit me up, or hey, just in case we still haven't had the communication, or even if you've spoke to people, even if you've had the appointment, send them the digital playbook.'"

 

[02:48]"Now, check this out. Battle plan blueprint. Hey, uh, what steps do you go through? Here they are."

 

[02:55]"At the bottom of here, you can see I clearly have our website listed. You can see I also have personal info listed here for different emails at the time when I had this because this is when I first launched my agency."

 

[03:08]"The only thing I've upgraded to in uh since is just adding different processes. You can see down here I actually have one of my older salespeople's information as well. So, I always added point of contact for sales."

 

[03:22] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Página de Processos Complexos - Inspirada em DigitalMarketer.com"

 

NÚMEROS: Múltiplos fluxos de trabalho e processos detalhados

 

VISUAL: Layout complexo e detalhado mostrando expertise, design originalmente de digitalmarketer.com redesenhado, fluxogramas e processos visuais, informações de contato na parte inferior, apresentação visual impressionante e técnica

 

[03:25]"Now, this actually this is a great asset that originally the design of it. It's a website called digitalmarketer.com. they do an incredible job with this."

 

[03:35]"And then I redesigned it, changed all the words, added different flows, made sure that I wasn't in any copyright or legal disagreements with them, and then from that perspective, I always use this because kind of overwhelms people."

 

[03:50]"So, I love this page because it gives people a representation that you know what you're talking about in a visual way."

 

[03:57] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Social Services Package (SSP)"

 

NÚMEROS: $4,000 (4K) - Preço do pacote, postagens mensais por plataforma listadas

 

VISUAL: Nome do produto em destaque (três palavras: SSP), descrição detalhada do pacote, bullet points específicos dos serviços incluídos, ícones de redes sociais com frequência de posts, preço claramente exibido, footer com informações de contato, layout profissional de produto VFP (Valuable Final Product)

 

[04:00]"Once again, right here, I roll right into the packages. This is my social services package. Need you guys to understand this. This is an example of what's called a product, a VFP, valuable final product."

 

[04:15]"This right here, see at the top it has a name of the product, social services package. Typically three words, SSP, social services package."

 

[04:25]"From there, I have a description of what the product is. Very simple. If the person wants to know, they can read social services package. You guys ready?"

 

[04:35]"With a well-thoughtout, reverse engineered strategy, we determine what social media channels your brand should be using, ways to increase audience engagement and awareness, and establish measurable goals and benchmarks to track your social media marketing projects."

 

[04:52]"We then execute content creation and distribution are always moving towards established benchmarks and goals."

 

[04:58]"Now, right there, right below that, I have very clearly listed all the bullet points of what's specifically included within that package, not result driven things."

 

[05:08]"Things like social media strategy development, social media consulting, community management, crisis management, measurement, monitoring."

 

[05:18]"You can see we have a price for our VFP, our valuable final product. This is at 4K. You can change this to where it also says monthly. You can change this in any way, shape, or form to however it's going to fit you."

 

[05:32]"You can also see down here I have visually, oh, what do we get? What's in the package, Jeremy, what specifically comes with it? Great question."

 

[05:42]"You can see right down here at the bottom each specific icon for the social mediums of how many times we're going to post. And that's throughout a 30-day cycle."

 

[05:52]"Incredible representation of what a product is, right? You can still see we have the price sheet at the top, information at the bottom. So, we have a constant footer."

 

[06:02] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Technical Services - Página Completa"

 

NÚMEROS: $12,000 (12K) mensal por categoria de serviço, atualmente $15,000 (15K) mínimo

 

VISUAL: Lista extensa de serviços técnicos detalhados, múltiplas categorias de serviços, keywords técnicas específicas, preços por categoria, layout "overwhelming" intencional para demonstrar expertise completa, footer consistente com informações

 

[06:05]"Now, on this page, this is the overwhelming page. We like to show people that we can do everything. And so, we list it out in technical services."

 

[06:15]"Each one of these things totals a 12k monthly price point and this was back in the day. Right now in real time when we choose to do any service once again we do it at a 15k minimum."

 

[06:28]"Each one of these specific things is very very very very specific. It's very um heavily keyworded. It's very something that they're not going to understand."

 

[06:40]"What I also found you can do here and the reason that these are so specific is because this matters. What you could do on this page as an example of a way to upgrade it if you'd like since you're going to recreate it anyway is take the broader buzzwords that are in some of the emails you can download in the sales strips category."

 

[07:00]"Things like uh the buzzwords like we'll do uh social media marketing, we'll do content creation, we will post on your Facebook, we'll post on your Twitter, we'll post on your LinkedIn, we'll post on your Instagram, we'll post twice a day,"

 

[07:18]"we will uh create you one funnel per month. We will integrate up to uh two email campaigns to two funnels each month with only five emails for each one."

 

[07:30]"We'll create up to 10 different ad campaigns in your Facebook account. You see what I'm talking about? Like list these things, say what's included. Put the price, create the product."

 

[07:42]"Every single component of what I said on the last page still exists, just laid out a little differently on the last page here because I do believe in your opportunity to build your personality brands."

 

[07:55] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Keynote Speaking Services"

 

NÚMEROS: $5,000 (5K) por apresentação

 

VISUAL: Página de pitch para palestras, três parágrafos descritivos sobre serviços de speaking, posicionamento como speaker profissional, preço de speaking claramente exibido, oportunidade de branding pessoal

 

[07:58]"Obviously, I focus on personality brands and my digital agency is an opportunity for you to do keynote speaking. Toss it in the back. let people know you're a speaker. All of a sudden, you might become one."

 

[08:12]"I charged 5K for speaking gigs. And right here, it was just a great way for a speaking pitch."

 

[08:18]"So, if you do a speaking pitch, it's a great example of ways that you can represent and kind of use these three different paragraphs right here and kind of plug and play your own verbiage."

 

[08:30]"Great example of how you can get ahead on day number 14 to go hit your hundred per day using a creative follow-up tool."

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

$5 por cópia impressa no FedEx Kinko

$50-$100 para imprimir 10-20 playbooks

6 passos específicos no Battle Plan Blueprint

$4,000 (4K) - Preço do Social Services Package (SSP)

$12,000 (12K) mensal - Preço histórico dos Technical Services

$15,000 (15K) - Preço mínimo atual de serviços

$5,000 (5K) - Taxa por apresentação de keynote speaking

Dia 14 do desafio de 30 dias

Meta de 100 contatos por dia

Ciclo de 30 dias para postagens em redes sociais

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

Digital Playbook como Ferramenta de Follow-up: Material de acompanhamento profissional para reengajar prospects

Terceirização de Design: Usar Fiverr/Upwork para criar versões customizadas do playbook

Impressão Profissional: Spiralbound com capa plástica para eventos presenciais

Branding Consistente: Cores e identidade visual forte em todo material

Baseball Card Pessoal: Página de estatísticas e resultados pessoais com foto sorridente

Battle Plan Blueprint: Seis etapas claras do processo de trabalho

VFP (Valuable Final Product): Estrutura de produto com nome de 3 palavras, descrição, bullet points, preço e visuais

Página "Overwhelming": Lista técnica completa para demonstrar expertise total

Múltiplos Pontos de Contato: Website, emails, informações de vendas em cada página

Reengajamento Estratégico: Usar playbook para contatar prospects que não responderam

 

ESTRUTURA:

Formato do Playbook:

Capa com branding forte

Baseball Card (página pessoal com estatísticas)

Battle Plan Blueprint (6 passos do processo)

Página de processos complexos (inspirada em DigitalMarketer.com)

Social Services Package (SSP) - produto VFP detalhado

Technical Services - lista completa de serviços

Keynote Speaking - página de pitch para palestras

 

Estrutura VFP (Valuable Final Product):

Nome do produto (3 palavras + sigla)

Descrição estratégica

Bullet points de serviços incluídos (não resultados)

Preço claramente exibido

Ícones visuais com especificações

Footer consistente com informações de contato

 

Aplicações do Playbook:

Material para eventos presenciais

Follow-up por email

Reengajamento de prospects frios

Apresentação pós-reunião

Ferramenta de credibilidade

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

Custo de Produção: $50-$100 para 10-20 playbooks impressos profissionalmente

Custo Unitário: $5 por playbook no FedEx Kinko

Pacotes de Serviços:

Social Services Package: $4,000/mês

Technical Services (histórico): $12,000/mês por categoria

Serviços atuais: Mínimo $15,000

Keynote Speaking: $5,000 por apresentação

ROI do Material: Investimento baixo ($50-100) para ferramenta de fechamento high-ticket

Posicionamento Premium: Preços elevados comunicam valor e expertise

 

DURAÇÃO: ~8:30 minutos FORMATO: Treinamento prático de vendas - Day 14 do desafio de 30 dias, focado em criação de material de follow-up profissional (Digital Playbook)
